title: stachys riederi var. riederi
intro: Stachys riederi var. riederi, also known as Chinese hedgenettle, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches, and soothing digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. Stachys riederi var. riederi can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
